meaning: adj.果实结得多的,多产的,富有成效的
examples: We had a long, happy, fruitful relationship.
Their efforts have been proven fruitful.
The work will be more fruitful under this plan.
If beating the stock market was so difficult, perhaps commodities would prove more fruitful.
These presentations were followed by fruitful discussions with the lead discussant Mr. Mamadou Ndiaye of CESTI.
